steps.text: Keep pressing + until the Total shows 3!
steps.feedback: Three {fruit_a_p}! Count them — one, two, three.

steps.text: Tap the Total number to count them all!
Use + on A and B — they add together to make the Total. Can you make five?
steps.feedback: Five! How did you split them between A and B?

steps.text: Tap the Total to count all five!
Use + and − to make A and B equal — the same number in each!
steps.feedback: They match! When two groups are the same we say they're equal.

steps.text: Tap the Total to count them all!
Ten is a special number! Press + on A and B until the Total shows 10!
Tap the Total and count all the way to ten!
Press + on group A to add one!
steps.feedback: A grew bigger! + adds one each time.
B grew too! Now press − to take one away.

steps.text: Press − on A to take one away!
steps.feedback: A got smaller! When a group has less we say it has fewer.

text: You explored adding and taking away. Brilliant!
